design_system.core_concept: Japanese Zen/Katana Precision mixed with ML/Aerospace Engineering. Dark, ink-heavy, highly editorial, mimicking string-tune.fiddle.digital.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none mixed-case with strategic italicized words
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none text-[#F4F4F0]
rules.h3: text-xl md:text-2xl font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#8A8A8A]

spacing_and_layout.grid_patterns: Asymmetrical masonry for projects, broken grid for about section, deep indentations for text blocks, floating labels.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: CSS-light smooth scroll (Lenis), staggered text reveals on scroll (split words/chars).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale down (0.95) with grayscale to color transition. Project captions reveal on hover.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom dot cursor with inverse difference blending, expands over clickable elements.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Glitch/scramble text reveal for the hero headline.

sections.layout: 100vh full bleed, centered or deep-left align with massive top padding. Large mixed-case typography breaking across multiple lines. Tiny mono coordinates or versioning scattered in corners.

copy_direction.tagline: AI/ML Engineer • Creative Technologist • Full Stack

sections.layout: Two-column asymmetrical. Left column empty or containing tiny floating glyph/Japanese character. Right column contains large editorial pull quote and smaller dense paragraph.

copy_direction.pull_quote: Exploring the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, Space Systems, Backend Engineering, and Quantitative Finance.
copy_direction.paragraph: Based in Bangalore. Leading ML initiatives for aerospace, from CubeSats to drone weather networks. Engineering backend systems with the precision of a katana strike.

sections.layout: Marquee auto-scroll bands for tech stack, moving in opposite directions. Large outline text with a single accent color fill on hover.

copy_direction.band_1: Python / C++ / Flutter / Node.js / React / JavaScript / HTML / CSS / Arduino
copy_direction.band_2: PyTorch / Pandas / Firebase / ML Kit / Quantitative Trading / RL

sections.layout: Masonry/Asymmetric grid. Images varying in height and width. Captions float beside or reveal on hover. Thin 1px borders separating items or completely borderless with deep negative space.
Vertical timeline but highly minimal. Just years, roles, and tiny description. Use monospace heavily here for a 'sys-log' feel.
Cookie-banner-like sticky footer or massive typography at the bottom of the page. Extreme minimalist layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure pure HTML + Tailwind for structural components. Heavy use of framer-motion for staggering text. Apply Lenis for smooth scroll if possible. Use the background_texture with low opacity (mix-blend-overlay or opacity-10) over a fixed #030303 background to create a dark grainy feel. Do not use generic card UI; everything must feel borderless, editorial, and typographical. Avoid standard purple/teal AI colors; strictly stick to Bone/Cream text on Obsidian background with Vermillion Red accent (#FF3B30). Use exact typography pairing (Cormorant Garamond + Manrope + JetBrains Mono). Include data-testid on interactive elements. Ensure responsive masonry behavior for projects.
